principles: Render from tenant metadata, not hardcoded vertical aliases.
Show validated data before generated text.
Expose proposed, validated, rejected, needs_review and blocked states.
Every important field should show source, writer, confidence and trace.
Pipeline and workflows should be visible as auditable consequences.

affected_components.required_change: Add operational turn summary and trace access.
Replace hardcoded canonical aliases with tenant metadata.
Add universal decision timeline, guard cards and tool cards.
Show stage reason, trace source and automation status.
Lint critical business events, loops and side effects.

acceptance_criteria: A non-vehicle tenant can render fields without React code changes.
Blocked model proposals are visible as blocked, not final values.
Documents cannot appear complete without attachment or human evidence.
Quotes without quote.resolve are visibly blocked.
Advisor can understand what final message was sent and why.
